mapper.sql: id, order_id, product_id, price, quantity, amount, remark, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT oi.id, oi.order_id, oi.product_id, oi.price, oi.quantity, oi.amount, oi.remark, oi.create_time FROM order_item oi JOIN `order` o ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE o.shop_id = #{shopid}

SELECT
FROM order_item oi JOIN `order` o ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE o.user_id = #{userid}
